mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.subtitle, s.cover_url, s.rating, s.rating_count, s.price_text, s.address, s.favorite_count, s.comment_count, c.name as city_name FROM t_spot_favorite f INNER JOIN t_spot s ON f.spot_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_destination_city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
